query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A tan-colored wall with visible vertical seams and subtle surface texture fills the lower two-thirds of the frame, with a dark horizontal roofline or overhang visible along the top edge against a pale sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tan-colored wall with visible vertical seams and subtle surface texture, rendered with extreme motion blur and smeared detail that dissolves the upper edge into streaked gray and dark tones, creating an abstracted, dreamlike effect where architectural elements lose definitional clarity and the scene collapses into soft indistinction.
